nasb.text: God called the dry land earth, and the gathering of the waters He called seas; and God saw that it was good.

esv.text: God called the dry land Earth, and the waters that were gathered together he called Seas. And God saw that it was good.

cnv.text: 神稱旱地為地，稱水的聚處為海。　神看這是好的。

ccb.text: 上帝称干地为陆地，称水汇聚的地方为海洋。上帝看了，感到满意。

csbs.text: 神称干处为“地”，称水的聚集之处为“海”。神看这是好的。
